name: Perfectly Seasoned Snackin' Mix
directions: In small bowl, whisk together first 5 ingredients.
In large bowl, toss together pretzels and crackers.
Pour dressing mixture over top, and toss well to coat evenly.
Spread mixture onto large baking pan and bake at 300 degrees for 10-15 min.
,mixing once halfway through baking time.
Let cool, and store in airtight container or ziplock bag.

name: Cookie Lover's Snack Mix
directions: In a large bowl, combine all ingredients; toss gently.
Store tightly in covered container.

name: Traditional Chex Party Mix
directions: Preheat oven to 205 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat butter in a shallow roasting pan (15" x 10" x 2") in oven until melted. Remove pan from oven.
Stir in seasoned salt and Worcestershire sauce.
Add Rice Chex, Wheat Chex, Corn Chex, and nuts.
Mix well until all ingredients are coated.
Heat in oven 1 hour, stirring every 15 minutes.
Spread on paper towels to absorb excess fat and to cool.
Store in an airtight container.

name: Crispix Snack Mix
directions: Preheat oven to 250°F.
Melt butter in 9x13-inch pan in oven.  Remove from oven and stir in garlic powder, onion powder, lemon juice, and Worcestershire sauce.
Add cereal, nuts, and pretzels stirring until coated.
Bake for 45 minutes, stirring every 15 minutes.  Spread on absorbent paper to cool.
Microwave directions combine ingredients as above, placing in a glass container and microwave on full power 4 minutes stirring after 2 minute
Cool as above.

name: Low Cal Chex-Mix Snack
directions: Melt smart balance in a saucepan.
Add worcestershire sauce, and other seasonings, heat until hot and mixed together.
In large pot or bowl add the chex mix and pretzels together.
slowly add a little of the liquid mix on top of the chex, adding a little, shake the chex like you would when adding butter to popcorn.
Repeat this process until the liquid mix is all gone.
get a lipped baking sheet and place the chex mix in and stir.
Bake at 250 degrees for 1 hour.
stir every 15 minutes.
let cool and store in air tight container.

name: Kids Snack Mix
directions: Mix all the ingredients together and enjoy. Store leftovers in an air tight container.

name: Chocolate, Peanut and Caramel Corn Snack Mix
directions: Combine caremel corn, peanuts, pretzel twists and chocolate peices on large rimmed baking sheet.  Drizzle with melted chocolate.  Cool until set; break into pieces.

name: Snack Mix
directions: Melt oleo, stir in seasoning and blend well.
Add remaining ingredients, stir until coated.
Bake at 250 F for 15 minutes, stirring once.

name: Sweet and Salty Snack Mix
directions: In a large bowl combine cereal, nuts and pretzels.
In a small saucepan over low heat melt butter.
Add brown sugar and cook and stir until dissolved.
Pour over cereal mixture and stir to coat.
Place 1/3 on a greased 15x10x1 jelly roll pan and bake at 325 for 8 minutes.
Stir and bake an additional 6 minutes.
Spread on waxed paper to cool.
Repeat w/remaining mixture.
Enjoy!

name: Lisa's Snack Mix
directions: Preheat oven to 250.
Melt the first three ingredients together.
In a large bowl, mix cereal and nuts.
Pour melted mix over and stir carefully.
Spread onto 2 rimmed cookie sheets.
Bake for 30 minutes.
Carefully separate with a spatula during the first few minutes of cooling.
Store in tightly covered container.

name: Spicy Chex Mix
directions: Preheat the oven for 250*.
Microwave the butter and rest of seasoning until melted.   Pour over the already mixed dry ingredients.  Toss well until all is coated with the seasoning mixture.
Pour onto 2 cookie sheets and bake in an oven at 250* for 1 hour.  Make sure to take out every 15 minutes to toss then put back in the oven.
Pour onto paper towels and let the mixture cool.
Store in an airtight container.

name: Crunchy Snack Mix
directions: In large bowl, mix all ingredients.
Store in covered container up to 1 month.
Make the Most of This Recipe.
Special Touch.
Serve this kid-pleasin' snack mix in colorful ice cream cones or cups.

similar.name: Chocolate, Peanut and Caramel Corn Snack Mix

name: Sarah's Snack Mix
directions: Combine all dry cereals. Combine apple juice, worcestershire sauce and seasonings. Toss liquids with cereals and place on a shallow non-stick baking sheet. Bake at 275 degrees for one hour - stirring every 10 minute.
